# Aviator Log In

> Official guides, demo, download, and blog for Aviator (crash-style game). English URLs use the `/en/` prefix; other languages use the same slugs under `/{lang}/`.

## Main pages

- [Home](https://aviator-log-in.com/en/)
- [Demo (play in browser)](https://aviator-log-in.com/en/demo/)
- [Demo app (fullscreen)](https://aviator-log-in.com/en/demo/app/)
- [Download / Android APK guide](https://aviator-log-in.com/en/download/)
- [Predictor](https://aviator-log-in.com/en/predictor/)

## Content

- [Blog](https://aviator-log-in.com/en/blog/)
- [Guides](https://aviator-log-in.com/en/guides/)
- [Games](https://aviator-log-in.com/en/games/)

## Machine-readable

- [Sitemap](https://aviator-log-in.com/api/sitemap/index_hub.xml)
- [robots.txt](https://aviator-log-in.com/robots.txt)
